name: claude-seo-pro
description: Client-ready SEO command center for Claude Code. A hardened distribution of the open-source claude-seo system (25 sub-skills, 18 specialist agents) plus a guided onboarding wizard that securely collects and wires up the DataForSEO, Google (PSI/CrUX/GSC/GA4), Firecrawl, and Exa APIs. Adds an Evidence Integrity Protocol to the audit pipeline so findings are traceable to evidence and never fabricated, and fixes the shared-script path bug that could leave audit subagents unable to fetch. Built so one SEO manager can run enterprise-grade, evidence-verified audits from a single CLI.

based_on.name: claude-seo
based_on.author: AgriciDaniel
based_on.note: Upstream is MIT-licensed; this distribution adds guided onboarding, secure credential storage, and the Evidence Integrity Protocol. See NOTICE.
